heroHeadline: Power System Consultants: Your Strategic Ally for Energy Management Solutions in Vietnam
heroSubtext: Ensure safety and electrical continuity for your critical infrastructure with our extensive power system solutions in Vietnam. We guarantee seamless power optimization without disruptions.
heroImageAlt: Carelabs electrical safety engineer conducting power system analysis at a US industrial facility
servicesSubtext: From arc flash hazard analysis to power quality studies, Carelabs provides the full spectrum of electrical engineering services your facility needs to stay safe and compliant.

services.title: Arc Flash Study
services.description: IEEE 1584 compliant incident energy calculations, PPE labeling, and hazard mitigation for TCVN 7447 compliance.

services.title: Short Circuit Analysis
services.description: Calculate available fault currents to properly size protective devices and ensure equipment ratings are adequate.

services.title: Load Flow Analysis
services.description: Verify voltage levels, power flows, and system capacity under normal and contingency operating conditions.

services.title: Relay Coordination Study
services.description: Optimize protective device settings to minimize outage duration and prevent nuisance tripping.

services.title: Power Quality Analysis
services.description: Identify harmonics, voltage sags, and power factor issues degrading your electrical system performance.

whySubtext: Trusted by Fortune 500 companies, industrial manufacturers, and critical infrastructure operators across Vietnam.

whyFeatures.title: TCVN 7447 Expertise
whyFeatures.description: Our engineers specialize in TCVN 7447 electrical safety standards with deep experience across industrial, healthcare, and data center environments.

whyFeatures.title: ETAP Certified
whyFeatures.description: We use industry-leading ETAP software for all power system modeling, ensuring accurate and defensible engineering results.

whyFeatures.title: Fast Turnaround
whyFeatures.description: Typical project delivery in 2 to 6 weeks. Expedited timelines available for critical compliance deadlines and facility shutdowns.

ctaBannerSubtext: Get a comprehensive electrical safety assessment for your facility. Our engineers are ready to help you achieve TCVN 7447 compliance.
footerDescription: Carelabs provides professional electrical safety services including arc flash studies, power system analysis, and compliance solutions for industrial and commercial facilities across Vietnam.
metaTitle: Protect Your Facility from Electrical Hazards Today
metaDescription: Carelabs offers specialized power system consulting to enhance safety and compliance for Vietnam industries. Schedule a consultation to mitigate risks and improve efficiency.

faqs.answer: Power system consulting involves expert analysis and optimization of electrical power systems to ensure safety, reliability, and compliance with industry standards like DOLISA, TCVN 7447, and IEEE 1584.
faqs.question: What is power system consulting?

faqs.answer: A power system study identifies potential hazards, ensures equipment is properly rated, validates protective device coordination, and helps your facility meet regulatory compliance requirements.
faqs.question: Why do I need a power system study for my facility?

faqs.answer: Carelabs serves a wide range of industries including manufacturing, healthcare, data centers, oil and gas, commercial real estate, education, government facilities, and more across Vietnam.
faqs.question: What industries does Carelabs serve in Vietnam?

faqs.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of your facility. Most projects are completed within 2 to 6 weeks, from data collection through final report delivery.
faqs.question: How long does a typical power system study take?

faqs.answer: Simply contact us through our website or call us directly. Our team will schedule a free consultation to understand your needs and provide a detailed proposal for your facility.
faqs.question: How do I get started with Carelabs?
